title: bridelia fischeri var. lingelsheimii
intro: Bridelia fischeri var. lingelsheimii, also known as the East African Bridelia, is a plant species belonging to the family Phyllanthaceae. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Bridelia fischeri var. lingelsheimii is often prepared into herbal teas, decoctions, and infusions, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
